since_last: 31% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +0.81%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC +1.55% · Gold +0.13% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 31% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +0.81%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +0.81%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.86%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SPCX is the standout at -5.54%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +4.69%, SMCI +3.31%, INTC +3.19%, VRT +2.41%, CGNX +2.30%. Laggards: SPCX -5.54%, SAP -3.47%, APP -2.19%, GOOGL -1.82%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.54% at $174.75
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.54% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
